function extract_quotes(text)
  local results = [[SLOT init_results]]
  local pattern = [[SLOT pattern]]
  for match in text:[[SLOT iter]](pattern) do
    local unescaped = match:gsub('\\(.)', [[SLOT unescape_replace]])
    table.insert(results, unescaped)
  end
  return results
end
